tool_args.raw_text: $11 million reduction in costs beginning in 2026

payload.raw_value_text: $11 million reduction in costs beginning in 2026
payload.description: Estimated $11 million reduction in costs from decommissioning legacy applications beginning in 2026

One DHMO plan with 1,077 enrollees insured with Dentcare

tool_args.label: No Vendors Responded to Kyndryl Advertisement
tool_args.raw_text: No vendors responded resulting from this advertisement.

payload.claim_text: No vendors responded resulting from this advertisement.
payload.description: Noncompetitive public advertisement for Kyndryl contract resulted in no vendor responses

tool_args.label: On-Premises Hardware Cost Double Kyndryl
tool_args.raw_text: MTA IT conducted an in-house estimate for the cost of purchasing on-premises hardware (in lieu of zCloud) that showed a cost of over $109 million, including the outer years for maintenance and support, which is double the cost of contracting with Kyndryl.

payload.claim_text: MTA IT conducted an in-house estimate for the cost of purchasing on-premises hardware (in lieu of zCloud) that showed a cost of over $109 million, which is double the cost of contracting with Kyndryl.
payload.description: In-house estimate showed on-premises hardware at $109M vs Kyndryl contract at approximately $85.7M

tool_args.label: Kyndryl Best Fit for MTA Needs
tool_args.raw_text: Kyndryl's solution offers the best fit for MTA's needs, balancing speed, cost-efficiency, and operational reliability

payload.claim_text: Kyndryl's solution offers the best fit for MTA's needs, balancing speed, cost-efficiency, and operational reliability, which are critical to MTA operations.
payload.description: Staff summary conclusion on Kyndryl noncompetitive award justification

tool_args.label: MetLife Determined Best Value for PPO
tool_args.raw_text: MetLife submitted the highest-ranked proposal for the PPO plan with all evaluation criteria taken into consideration and therefore determined to offer the best value for the MTA.

payload.claim_text: MetLife submitted the highest-ranked proposal for the PPO plan with all evaluation criteria taken into consideration and therefore determined to offer the best value for the MTA.
payload.description: Selection Committee recommendation for MetLife PPO award

tool_args.label: Dentcare Selected for DHMO
tool_args.raw_text: The Selection Committee selected Dentcare's proposal based on having reasonable cost, access and the ability to match the current plan designs without any member disruption.

payload.claim_text: The Selection Committee selected Dentcare's proposal based on having reasonable cost, access and the ability to match the current plan designs without any member disruption.
payload.description: Selection Committee recommendation for Dentcare DHMO award

tool_args.label: MTA Mainframe Infrastructure Reaching End of Life
tool_args.raw_text: MTA's mainframe infrastructure is reaching the end of its useful life

payload.claim_text: MTA's mainframe infrastructure is reaching the end of its useful life, and timely migration to Kyndryl's zCloud platform is now crucial in order to maintain functionality of critical systems and ensure compliance with MTA's operational standards and cybersecurity requirements.
payload.description: Basis for Immediate Operating Need and noncompetitive award to Kyndryl

tool_args.label: MetLife Responsibility Finding with SAI
tool_args.raw_text: MetLife was found to be responsible notwithstanding significant adverse information ("SAI") pursuant to the All-Agency Responsibility Guidelines

payload.claim_text: In connection with a previous contract awarded to MetLife, MetLife was found to be responsible notwithstanding significant adverse information (SAI) ... approved by the MTA Interim Executive Director in consultation with the MTA General Counsel in March 2017.
payload.description: MetLife was found responsible despite SAI in 2017; no new SAI found
